caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap, and over-ear headphones speaks into a professional microphone in a podcast studio. He wears a gold chain around his neck and has a short beard. The background features a white wall adorned with gold stars and the repeated text "HUSTLE." A prominent logo for "BOSS TALK 101" is visible on the wall behind him, and a smaller circular logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appears as an overlay on the left side of the screen. To his right, a second "BOSS TALK 101" logo is visible. As the sequence progresses, the man maintains a similar posture, gesturing slightly with his hand near his chest while continuing to speak. The lighting is bright and consistent, and there is very little movement between the frames, capturing a steady shot of him during a recording.
